violations.text: Inspector observed single service items stored on the floor in the back area. Single service items must be at least 6 inches off the ground. PIC relocated cups. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Handwashing sign is lacking in the restroom. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
